summary: Tested LikeButton (❤️) feature implementation. Backend: 8/8 tests pass - all engagement endpoints working correctly (/api/photo-game/engagement/like, /unlike, /photo/{id}). Frontend: LikeButton component renders correctly on MintedPhotos page with 7 instances, click toggles like/unlike state with proper color changes (gray→red), like count displays correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: LikeButton.jsx properly implements e.stopPropagation() to prevent parent click events
Component has proper data-testid attribute for testing: data-testid={`like-button-${photoId}`}
Burst animation implemented with framer-motion AnimatePresence
API calls use correct endpoints: POST /photo-game/engagement/like and DELETE /photo-game/engagement/unlike/{photoId}
LikeButtonCompact variant correctly wraps LikeButton with size='sm'

success_rate.frontend: 100% - LikeButton renders, clicks work, state changes correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: LikeButton feature is fully working. Backend endpoints tested: /api/photo-game/engagement/like (POST), /engagement/unlike/{photo_id} (DELETE), /engagement/photo/{photo_id} (GET). Frontend component tested on MintedPhotos page - 7 LikeButton instances found, click toggles state correctly. LikeButtonCompact is imported in BotDifficultySelector.jsx but requires navigating through Photo Battle Arena → Play with Bot → Continue to Photos to see it.
